'''âz-n-n''' ('''kazanan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartile|quartile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartile|quartile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-n-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazanan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizanan|thizanan]] || [[word:jizanan|jizanan]] || [[word:shizanan|shizanan]] || [[word:kizanan|kizanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzanan|thuthuzanan]] || [[word:jujuzanan|jujuzanan]] || [[word:shushuzanan|shushuzanan]] || [[word:kukuzanan|kukuzanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzanan|thuzanan]] || [[word:juzanan|juzanan]] || [[word:shuzanan|shuzanan]] || [[word:kuzanan|kuzanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzanan|thuzanan]] || [[word:juzanan|juzanan]] || [[word:shuzanan|shuzanan]] || [[word:kuzanan|kuzanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezanan|thezanan]] || [[word:jezanan|jezanan]] || [[word:shezanan|shezanan]] || [[word:kezanan|kezanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozanan|thothozanan]] || [[word:jojozanan|jojozanan]] || [[word:shoshozanan|shoshozanan]] || [[word:kokozanan|kokozanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozanan|thozanan]] || [[word:jozanan|jozanan]] || [[word:shozanan|shozanan]] || [[word:kozanan|kozanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozanan|thozanan]] || [[word:jozanan|jozanan]] || [[word:shozanan|shozanan]] || [[word:kozanan|kozanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚzanan|thĂŚzanan]] || [[word:jĂŚzanan|jĂŚzanan]] || [[word:shĂŚzanan|shĂŚzanan]] || [[word:kĂŚzanan|kĂŚzanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazanan|thathazanan]] || [[word:jajazanan|jajazanan]] || [[word:shashazanan|shashazanan]] || [[word:kakazanan|kakazanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazanan|thazanan]] || [[word:jazanan|jazanan]] || [[word:shazanan|shazanan]] || [[word:kazanan|kazanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazanan|thazanan]] || [[word:jazanan|jazanan]] || [[word:shazanan|shazanan]] || [[word:kazanan|kazanan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazanan|shazanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazanan|goshazanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazanan|gokishazanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazananĂź|shazananĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazananknĂź|goshazananknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazananĂź|gokishazananĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazananshĂŤ|shazananshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazanankshĂŤ|goshazanankshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazananshĂŤ|gokishazananshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazananro|shazananro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanankro|goshazanankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazananro|gokishazananro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazananmu|shazananmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanankmu|goshazanankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazananmu|gokishazananmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazanansher|shazanansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazananksher|goshazananksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazanansher|gokishazanansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazanang|shazanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazanankng|goshazanankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazanang|gokishazanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazananya|shazananya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazanankya|goshazanankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazananya|gokishazananya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazananyam|shazananyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazanankyam|goshazanankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazananyam|gokishazananyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazananĂźshĂŤ|shazananĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazananknĂźshĂŤ|goshazananknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazananĂźshĂŤ|gokishazananĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazananĂźro|shazananĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazananknĂźro|goshazananknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazananĂźro|gokishazananĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazananĂźmu|shazananĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazananknĂźmu|goshazananknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazananĂźmu|gokishazananĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazananshĂŤnĂź|shazananshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanankshĂŤnĂź|goshazanankshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazananshĂŤnĂź|gokishazananshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazananshĂŤro|shazananshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanankshĂŤro|goshazanankshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazananshĂŤro|gokishazananshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazananshĂŤmu|shazananshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanankshĂŤmu|goshazanankshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazananshĂŤmu|gokishazananshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazananronĂź|shazananronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanankronĂź|goshazanankronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazananronĂź|gokishazananronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazananroshĂŤ|shazananroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanankroshĂŤ|goshazanankroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazananroshĂŤ|gokishazananroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazananromu|shazananromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazanankromu|goshazanankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazananromu|gokishazananromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazananmunĂź|shazananmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazanankmunĂź|goshazanankmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazananmunĂź|gokishazananmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazananmushĂŤ|shazananmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazanankmushĂŤ|goshazanankmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazananmushĂŤ|gokishazananmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazananmuro|shazananmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazanankmuro|goshazanankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazananmuro|gokishazananmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
